channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump says US will ‘start dropping bombs again’ if no Iran deal is reached
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US will “have to start dropping bombs again” if no US-Iran deal is reached.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 50 of the US-Iran conflict?
item.description: Iran reopens the Strait of Hormuz with conditions and threatens closure if the US blockade of Iranian ports continues.

item.title: Trump thanks Gulf states for their ‘tremendous’ support
item.description: ‘This will be a great and brilliant day for the world’ Donald Trump said as Iran fully opens the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran says US blockade of ports must end as strait opens
item.description: Tens of thousands of people forcibly displaced by Israeli attacks on Lebanon use first day of ceasefire to return home.

item.title: Iran rejects Trump claim on deal to surrender nuclear material stockpiles
item.description: Iran has rejected suggestions by Donald Trump that it has agreed to hand over its stockpile of enriched uranium.

item.title: World reacts to Strait of Hormuz reopening amid US-Iran conflict
item.description: Politicians and industry welcome reopening of the vital waterway after throttling of traffic caused oil prices to spike.

item.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
item.description: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

item.title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
item.description: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

item.title: Iranian footballers say Australia has given them 'hope' for safe future
item.description: The duo had sought aslyum after their football team did not sing the national anthem during a match.

item.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
item.description: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.
